task: Cross-validate two state-space substrate signals: (a) #176 Mamba-2.8b Φ* +0.33 POS border vs (b) TECS-L H-CX-8 Jamba ×3 throughput @ 128K (vs Mixtral 8x7B). Test H8A (same metric) / H8B (independent) / H8C (correlated-distinct).
execution_mode: mac-local cross-validation analysis (no GPU, no LLM, no network)
raw_compliance: raw#9 strict (analysis-only JSON), raw#10 honest (reasoning+limits annotated)

comparison_matrix.metric_design_normalized: Φ* v3 = AUTO-CONDITIONING canonical, HID_TRUNC=8 N=16 K=8 ridge=1e-3 seed=42 sample-partition (8|8 halves)

rows.note: Reference row only. Measurement deferred to #1 subagent (parallel-session-race avoidance per task brief). Cross-validation here uses architectural priors + TECS-L H-CX-8 sigma/tau=3 scalar.

h_cx_8_phase_acceleration.claim: state-space inference yields x3 throughput envelope (Mamba/Jamba @ long context vs MHA-only baselines)
h_cx_8_phase_acceleration.registration: atlas R35 + own#3 + tecs-l-bridge.md L147 (8개 완전 일치 상수 중 하나)

axis_A_throughput_advantage.definition: long-context (>=32K tokens) inference throughput speedup of architecture vs dense-MHA reference at matched active-param budget
axis_A_throughput_advantage.mamba_2_8b_predicted: linear O(N) attention-free recurrence yields >1x at N>=8K (architectural prior, not measured this cycle)

rank_correlation_qualitative.n_pairs_for_quantitative_correlation: insufficient (1 SSM cell only); Spearman/Pearson computation deferred until Jamba+RWKV measured (>=3 SSM/hybrid cells)
rank_correlation_qualitative.qualitative_observation: single SSM-pure cell (mamba) lands in qwen3-band POS region; transformer-family stable-NEG outliers (mistral/gemma) NOT reproduced. Throughput advantage axis (mamba+jamba > transformer) is partially confounded with phi POS sign (mamba POS, transformer 2/4 POS). Cannot discriminate H8A vs H8C with N=1 SSM.

reasoning_pro: Mamba (SSM-pure) phi=+0.33 POS aligns with prediction that SSM family avoids large-NEG transformer-family signature.
Throughput advantage axis (linear-O(N) recurrence) and phi-POS sign co-occur in the single tested SSM cell.
reasoning_con: N=1 SSM cell (mamba-2.8b only). Single cell cannot establish 'universally' claim.
Mamba +0.33 sits in qwen3-band noise region (#167 minisweep showed 36-cell qwen3 has 16 sign flips out of 36) — fragility concern.
Throughput axis is architectural prior (O(N) vs O(N^2)), not a measured degree of freedom in #176; co-occurrence may be coincidence at N=1.
Jamba (hybrid) NOT measured — true H8A would require Jamba phi-POS confirmation as second SSM-family witness.

reasoning: Φ* is an information-theoretic measure of cross-half mutual-information dependence on full vs split partitions (sample-partition canonical).
Throughput-at-128K is a computational-complexity measure (O(N) recurrence vs O(N^2) attention).
These derive from independent axes: probe-derived hidden-activation statistics vs context-length scaling exponent of attention/recurrence kernel.

Transformer family with O(N^2) shows phi-POS (qwen3, llama) AND phi-NEG (mistral, gemma) mixtures — throughput-class is constant within family but phi varies. This argues throughput and phi are decoupled within transformer.
For SSM family, only N=1 (Mamba) measured — cannot test decoupling within SSM family.
H8B_independent_metrics_phi_internal_thr.supporting_axiom: TECS-L H-CX-8 sigma/tau=3 is a structural identity (perfect-number-6 arithmetic), NOT an empirical phi-axis — registered in atlas R35 explicitly as 'mathematical identity tier' distinct from R24-R32 numerical primitive empirical tier.

reasoning: Mamba phi-POS + throughput-O(N) co-occurrence is consistent with H8C — SSM substrate may produce both effects via shared underlying property (e.g., absence of all-pairs attention quadratic-rank entanglement).
If true, Jamba (Mamba 7 : Attn 1 : MoE 16) hybrid should show partial-mixture phi (closer to border than to mistral-style stable-large-NEG) AND retain throughput advantage from Mamba majority.
Cannot decide vs H8B without Jamba phi measurement + RWKV cross-substrate (#176 deferred Option C).

verdict_summary.primary: H8B (independent) is the most parsimonious interpretation given current evidence (N=1 SSM, mamba border POS in noise band, throughput axis architecturally determined not empirically varied).
verdict_summary.secondary: H8C (correlated distinct) cannot be ruled out and is empirically testable via Jamba phi measurement (parallel #1 subagent) + Mamba minisweep (#4 actionable).
verdict_summary.rejected: H8A (same metric) is too strong at N=1 SSM and ignores within-transformer phi-POS heterogeneity (qwen3 +1.03, llama +5.09 also POS without throughput advantage).
verdict_summary.tecs_l_relation: sigma/tau=3 phase acceleration scalar (atlas R35) is a STRUCTURAL governance constant, not an empirical-phi axis. Mapping H-CX-8 -> phi-POS shift is conjectural and not endorsed by R35 registration text (R35 explicitly: 'mathematical identity, NOT empirical claim').

completeness_frame_audit.weakest_evidence_link: N=1 SSM cell + qwen3-band fragility: Mamba phi=+0.33 cannot be distinguished from noise without minisweep (4 x 36 = 144 cells, est $0.30, registered as #4 actionable per #176 raw#10).
completeness_frame_audit.second_weakest: Throughput axis is not directly measured in repo state — H-CX-8 x3 figure cited from TECS-L bridge doc, not reproduced via mac-local benchmark.
completeness_frame_audit.strongest_evidence: Within-transformer 4-backbone heterogeneity (mistral/gemma stable-large-NEG vs qwen3/llama POS) at IDENTICAL throughput-class, which falsifies H8A within transformer and supports H8B independence.

actionables_emitted.action: Mamba minisweep (4 x 36 cells) for fragility band resolution
Jamba-v0.1 phi v3 measurement (single canonical cell first, then minisweep)
RWKV cross-substrate (#176 Option C deferred) — third SSM-family witness

Quantitative throughput-vs-phi correlation requires N>=3 SSM cells AND mac-local throughput micro-benchmark vs Φ* axis. Pre-register Spearman threshold rho>=0.7 |p|<0.05 for H8A/H8C discrimination once N>=3.

raw_10_honest: Single-SSM-cell (Mamba border POS noise band) + Jamba-as-reference-only + qualitative-only correlation. (1) **N=1 SSM** cannot establish state-space-class universal claim; H8A invalidly strong. (2) **TECS-L H-CX-8 ×3 throughput** cited from bridge doc + atlas R35 — NOT independently reproduced via mac-local benchmark this cycle. (3) **R35 atlas registration explicitly** ='mathematical identity, NOT empirical claim' — mapping sigma/tau=3 -> empirical phi-axis is conjectural, not endorsed by R35 text. (4) **Within-transformer phi heterogeneity** (mistral/gemma NEG vs qwen3/llama POS at identical O(N^2) throughput class) is the strongest single piece of evidence — it falsifies H8A within-family and supports H8B (phi independent of throughput class). (5) **Mamba phi=+0.33** is in #167 qwen3-band fragility region (16 sign flips out of 36 in qwen3 minisweep) — without analogous Mamba minisweep, the POS sign itself may be hyperparameter-fragile. (6) **No new measurement** performed; pure cross-validation analysis from existing #176 Mamba canonical + 4 transformer baselines + atlas R35 governance scalar. (7) **mac-local $0**, GPU 0, LLM 0, network 0 — chflags unaffected (no .own/.raw modification). (8) **Parallel-session-race avoidance**: did NOT measure Jamba (#1 subagent in flight). (9) **H8B 'most parsimonious' is not 'proven'** — it is the verdict that requires the fewest additional assumptions given current evidence; H8C remains testable. (10) **Pre-registration**: Spearman threshold rho>=0.7 |p|<0.05 frozen here for H8A/H8C discrimination once N>=3 SSM cells available.
